title: The Worlds Of Light And Dark
description: Explore a world where light and dark have lost balance.
body:
# NOTICE
**Hey guys, i had some troubles and can't update until like the 23rd. Sorry i almost had the update finished but then some hardware troubles cams along**

# NOTE
This is basically an alternate universe for **Deltarune** but it's not, its based on **Deltarune** but not about **Deltarune**, Also Adds A **Deltarune** Item

**_Just For Fun_**


### **ALONE**

This mod is a mod made by one **_Developer_** _It might not be perfect but it will be great in the end_



### The world's Imbalance

The world's balance has been destroyed by an unknown force **YOU** must save minecraft **YOU** are the one, do not fail hero, the world grows weaker.

## Summery

This mod adds **new tools**.
a **new dimension**. **new biomes**.
**new ores**. and soon **new mobs**. I hope to be adding more things like that in the future.

### Socials
